_comment: Dogfooding manifest for the zero-two-one framework's own source repo (r5). mode 'source' marks the self-referential case (this repo is the framework source, not an init target). Hand-authored to resolve the phase source-of-truth conflict; the Init v2 engine regenerates the full file-hash inventory for this repo in mvp-3 (see requirements/_releases/mvp-3.md).
